readability.title: Readability
checks: Comments explain why, not obvious syntax
Long blocks are broken into smaller units

correctness.title: Correctness
checks: The code handles the stated requirement
Outputs match the expected data shape

reliability.title: Reliability
checks: Important behaviour has assertions or tests
Resources are closed or managed safely

efficiency.title: Efficiency
checks: Large data is not copied unnecessarily
The solution is simple before it is clever
